title: cleisostoma subulatum
intro: Cleisostoma subulatum, also known as the Chinese Cleisostoma, is a type of orchid native to China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and serving as an antiseptic agent. In traditional Chinese medicine, Cleisostoma subulatum is often prepared as an herbal tea, dried powder, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
